name: Chuck Faranda Emission Nebula Workflow
description: Optimized for Hα, OIII and SII emission nebulae using OSC dual-band or mono narrowband data.

steps.note: Crop only stacking artifacts; preserve faint outer emission.
Remove pedestal without clipping faint nebulosity.
Preferred: AutoBGE. Alternatives: GraXpert AI or VeraLux Nox. Preserve faint hydrogen signal.
Neutralize background after gradient removal; verify no color cast remains.
Preferred: SPCC. Maintain realistic Hα/OIII balance.

RC-Astro BlurXTerminator. Preferred: BlurXTerminator (15–25%) then NoiseXTerminator (light). StarXTerminator is recommended for separate nebula processing when appropriate. Alternatives: SyQon Parallax and SyQon Prism.
RC-Astro NoiseXTerminator. Apply conservatively for the target.
RC-Astro StarXTerminator. Use only when the workflow calls for starless processing.
Use Generalized Hyperbolic Stretch for most data; Statistical Stretch for extremely faint emission.
Enhance contrast conservatively while protecting faint outer nebulosity.
Optional; apply only to enhance filament detail.
Save the 32-bit floating-point FITS working master. Create a 16-bit TIFF only for final publication, printing, or software that requires TIFF.s.

author: Chuck Faranda
